_comment: Cygnet UI config for the Myanmar Open Wordnet.
title: Myanmar Open Wordnet
name: MOW

main.description: The main MOW lexical database, containing synsets, entries, senses, and definitions.

provenance.description: Provenance records tracing every data point back to its source.

about.intro:
The Myanmar Open Wordnet (MOW) is a freely-available semantic dictionary of the Myanmar/Burmese language, inspired by Princeton WordNet and the Global WordNet Grid. It is part of the Open Multilingual Wordnet.

Source code on GitHub.
about.citation: If you use the Myanmar Open Wordnet, please cite the MOW team (2017) and Maudslay & Bond (2026) for the interface.
about.languageData: The Myanmar Open Wordnet covers Myanmar/Burmese (ISO 639-3: mya), linked to English via the Princeton WordNet synset hierarchy.
